word: G2164 - εὐφορέω - euphoréō - yoo-for-eh'-o - Bring forth abundantly

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Bring forth abundantly
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be fertile, bring forth plentifully
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2095 and G5409; to bear well, that is, be fertile: - bring forth abundantly.
